description_long: This is a tall, rectangular metal parcel locker with a weathered, industrial appearance, featuring a tarnished brass or bronze finish. The front side has a single vertical door equipped with a sturdy metal handle and a circular lock, as well as a vented panel near the top and faint geometric graffiti. The surface is marked by patches of discoloration and wear, suggesting frequent use and exposure to the elements. The sides and back are plain, with the left side showing the handle protruding slightly and the right side being featureless. The locker stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its utilitarian design is typical for secure storage in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or apartment complexes.
description: A tall, weathered metal parcel locker with a single front door, handle, and vent, finished in tarnished brass tones and marked by signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: The left side of the parcel locker, showing a plain, tarnished metal surface with some discoloration and a faint circular mark.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the main access door with a metal handle, circular lock, vented panel, and faint graffiti.
description_view_2: The right side, mostly plain with the handle of the door visible, showing the locker’s depth and metallic texture.
description_view_3: The back view, completely featureless except for the weathered metal finish and subtle surface marks.
attribute_access_door_design: swing-out metal door with a protruding metal handle and circular lock
